episodes.title: The Hadal Zone
episodes.description: Descending into the deepest trenches — the Mariana, the Tonga, and the Philippine.

episodes.title: Pressure
episodes.description: How life survives at depths where the pressure crushes steel — the biology of the extreme.

episodes.title: Bioluminescence Fields
episodes.description: In permanent darkness, light becomes the primary language of the deep.

episodes.title: Chemosynthesis
episodes.description: Hydrothermal vent communities that derive energy not from sunlight, but from the Earth itself.

episodes.title: The Snailfish
episodes.description: The deepest-living vertebrate — filmed in its native habitat for the first time at 8,000 meters.

episodes.title: The Unknown Floor
episodes.description: Only 20% of the ocean floor has been mapped. What the remaining 80% might contain.

episodes.title: New Vehicles
episodes.description: Next-generation full-ocean-depth submersibles open regions previously unreachable.

episodes.title: The Cold Seeps
episodes.description: Methane cold seep communities are as rich as vents — and far more widespread.

episodes.title: Whale Falls
episodes.description: When a whale dies and sinks, it sustains a unique ecosystem for decades.

episodes.title: Abyssal Plains
episodes.description: The vast, featureless plains of the deep sea and the creatures that live in apparent emptiness.

episodes.title: Mining the Deep
episodes.description: The growing push to mine polymetallic nodules from the abyssal floor — and the cost.

episodes.title: Depth of Knowledge
episodes.description: What deep-sea research has taught us about the origins of life on Earth and beyond.

extras.title: The Submersible Pilots
extras.description: Interviews with the engineers and pilots behind the deep-sea vehicles.

extras.title: Unknown Species Gallery
extras.description: A visual catalog of creatures discovered during the filming of this series.
